observations.title: Spirit of Kiro is an infinite crafting workshop game that demonstrates AI-powered game developmen...
observations.summary: Spirit of Kiro is an infinite crafting workshop game that demonstrates AI-powered game development. The game features:

observations.title: **Infinite Item Generation**: Every item is unique with AI-generated names, descriptions, damage ...
observations.summary: **Infinite Item Generation**: Every item is unique with AI-generated names, descriptions, damage values, and quirks

observations.title: **Dynamic Crafting System**: Transform, combine, and improve items using realistic crafting mecha...
observations.summary: **Dynamic Crafting System**: Transform, combine, and improve items using realistic crafting mechanics powered by AI

observations.title: **Intelligent Appraisal**: AI-driven item valuation system for selling crafted goods
observations.summary: **Intelligent Appraisal**: AI-driven item valuation system for selling crafted goods

observations.title: **Real-time Multiplayer**: WebSocket-based client-server architecture for responsive gameplay
observations.summary: **Real-time Multiplayer**: WebSocket-based client-server architecture for responsive gameplay

observations.title: 1. Pull random items from the dispenser
observations.summary: 1. Pull random items from the dispenser

observations.title: 2. Craft and modify items at the workbench using AI-powered transformations
observations.summary: 2. Craft and modify items at the workbench using AI-powered transformations

observations.title: 3. Store items in inventory chest or sell them to the appraiser
observations.summary: 3. Store items in inventory chest or sell them to the appraiser

observations.title: 4. Repeat with increasingly valuable and complex items
observations.summary: 4. Repeat with increasingly valuable and complex items

observations.title: The game heavily leverages AWS Bedrock models (Nova Pro, Claude Sonnet 3.7/4) for:
observations.summary: The game heavily leverages AWS Bedrock models (Nova Pro, Claude Sonnet 3.7/4) for:

observations.title: Item generation and descriptions
observations.summary: Item generation and descriptions

observations.title: Crafting logic and transformations
observations.summary: Crafting logic and transformations

observations.title: Item appraisal and pricing
observations.summary: Item appraisal and pricing

observations.title: Image generation via Nova Canvas
observations.summary: Image generation via Nova Canvas

observations.title: This project serves as a demonstration of best practices for AI-assisted development and showcase...
observations.summary: This project serves as a demonstration of best practices for AI-assisted development and showcases how AI can power core game mechanics.

observations.title: The client uses a system-based architecture where independent systems communicate via events:
observations.summary: The client uses a system-based architecture where independent systems communicate via events:

observations.title: **Socket System**: Manages WebSocket communication
observations.summary: **Socket System**: Manages WebSocket communication

observations.title: **Physics System**: Handles collision detection and movement
observations.summary: **Physics System**: Handles collision detection and movement

observations.title: **Game Object System**: Tracks on-screen objects
observations.summary: **Game Object System**: Tracks on-screen objects

observations.title: **Item/Inventory Systems**: Manage game items and storage
observations.summary: **Item/Inventory Systems**: Manage game items and storage

observations.summary: Server handlers are organized by message type

observations.summary: **Bun**: Primary JavaScript runtime for both client and server development
